positive: A stylized cosmic floral wreath, designed for apparel printing. The central elements include luminous, nebula-like swirling gases in deep indigo, vibrant magenta, and cyan, seamlessly integrated with intricate, highly symmetrical geometric mandalas and stylized bioluminescent flora. The composition is perfectly centered, forming a circular wreath or emblem. The artwork must possess sharp, clean vector lines, strong silhouette contrast against a slightly darkened background field, and a mesmerizing gradient color palette. Highly detailed, psychedelic yet elegant, vaporwave aesthetics meet mystical celestial science. Studio shot quality, perfect print resolution, minimal texture noise.
